name: api_contracts_audit

analysis.response_model_alternatives: FastAPI позволяет использовать return type hints (-> dict[str, Any]) вместо response_model. Это допустимая альтернатива.
analysis.delete_204_endpoints: DELETE endpoints со status_code=204_NO_CONTENT не требуют response_model — нет response body.
analysis.webhook_endpoints: Webhook endpoints (yookassa) не требуют strict response_model — важен только status code 200.
analysis.redirect_endpoints: Redirect endpoints (/r/{short_code}) возвращают Response.redirect — response_model не применим.

issues.description: Endpoint without response_model or return type hint
issues.impact: Response schema not enforced, API contract less clear

issues.description: Endpoint without response_model or return type hint
issues.impact: Response schema not enforced, API contract less clear

false_positives.reason: Use return type hint -> dict[str, Any] which is valid Pydantic-free alternative
Uses return type hint -> dict[str, str] which is valid
Webhook endpoint — response_model not critical, status_code=200 is correct
DELETE with status_code=204_NO_CONTENT — no response body, response_model not applicable
Redirect endpoint — returns Response.redirect, response_model not applicable

notes: 16 FALSE POSITIVES: endpoints use valid alternatives (return type hints, 204 No Content, webhooks, redirects)
2 VALID MEDIUM issues: start_placement_request and cancel_placement_request lack response_model or return type
Recommendation: Add return type hints or response_model to campaigns.py endpoints
Overall API contracts are well-defined with proper status codes
